title: poa alpina subsp. insularis
intro: Poa alpina subsp. insularis, also known as the Island Alpine Fescue, is a subspecies of grass that is native to the islands of the Mediterranean region. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Poa alpina subsp. insularis include reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and promoting overall well-being. The herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
